---
title: "Correcting WhisperX Segment Splits"
---

**[`correct_splits.py`](correct_splits.py)** is a Flask-based browser editor for correcting WhisperX segment boundaries. Each word is rendered as a `<span>` with its timing data; segments are `<div>` lines.

Editing works like a text editor:

- Backspace across a space → merge adjacent words
- Backspace at line start → merge segment with the previous one
- Space inside a word → split the word at cursor (timing interpolated)
- Enter → split segment before the word at/after the cursor

On save, segments are rebuilt from the edited words, with `start`/`end` taken from the first/last word.

```bash
python correct_splits.py path/to/file.json
# open http://127.0.0.1:5000
```
